chapters.title: Day and Night Signs
chapters.content_preview: Day and Night Signs  The use of day and night strong signs divides the zodiac into two groups’ of six signs each. Although Pisces is strong at both day and night, it is stronger in the day and is hence, kept in the day sign group as per the teachings of Parasara’.

chapters.title: Kasinatha Hora: Wealth
chapters.content_preview: Kasinatha Hora: Wealth  While Parasara Hora tells us about the ‘quality’ or strength levels of the planets, Kasinatha Hora gives us the qualitative aspect of wealth and shows the specific areas of investments, returns from investments, assets creation and ownership
